   2 | //!
   3 | //! Retrieval currently comes from memory, project search, session history, web,
   4 | //! files, and MCP. This module provides one provenance-bearing shape that each
   5 | //! source can migrate to without changing prompt assembly every time.

   1 | //! Learning-to-planning feedback.
   2 | //!
   3 | //! Runtime learning and high-confidence retrieval should not silently replace

   5 | //! an existing model-led workflow judgment.

   7 | use crate::engine::retrieval_context::{RetrievalContext, RetrievalSource, TrustLevel};
